Uses of Package
org.apache.bookkeeper.metastore

Packages that use org.apache.bookkeeper.metastore
Package
Description
org.apache.bookkeeper.meta
Classes for interacting with bookkeeper ledgers and ledger metadata.
org.apache.bookkeeper.metastore
MetaStore-related classes.

    Description
    MetaStore
    Metadata Store Interface.
    MetastoreCursor
    A Metastore Cursor.
    MetastoreScannableTable

    MetastoreTableItem
    Identify an item in a metastore table.
    MetastoreWatcher
    Metastore watcher.
    MSWatchedEvent
    A metastore watched event.

    Class
    Description
    InMemoryMetaStore
    An in-memory implementation of the MetaStore interface.
    InMemoryMetastoreTable
    An in-memory implementation of a Metastore table.
    InMemoryMetastoreTable.MetadataVersion
    An implementation of the Version interface for metadata.
    MetaStore
    Metadata Store Interface.
    MetastoreCallback
    Metastore callback.
    MetastoreCursor
    A Metastore Cursor.
    MetastoreCursor.ReadEntriesCallback
    A callback for reading entries.
    MetastoreException
    A marker for Metastore exceptions.
    MetastoreScannableTable
    Metastore Scannable Table.
    MetastoreScannableTable.Order
    The order to loop over a table.
    MetastoreTable
    Metastore Table interface.
    MetastoreTableItem
    Identify an item in a metastore table.
    MetastoreWatcher
    Metastore watcher.
    MSException
    Marker for metastore exceptions.
    MSException.Code
    Return codes.
    MSWatchedEvent
    A metastore watched event.
    MSWatchedEvent.EventType
    The metastore event type.
    Value
